summary: Completed comprehensive testing of personal records system - all functionality working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/records - Returns all 5 record categories (1km, 5km, 10km, semi, marathon)
POST /api/runs - Creates run AND returns new_records array when records are broken
POST /api/runs - Returns empty new_records when no records broken (slower run)
Personal records improvement detection - faster run beats previous record and shows improvement delta
Frontend: Dashboard shows Personal Records section with gold trophy icon
Frontend: Records with gold border for achieved (1km: 4:00, 5km: 20:00, 10km: 40:00), dim for unachieved (semi, marathon)
Frontend: Run list shows 6 runs with metrics and proper formatting
Frontend: Profile page navigation and display working correctly
Frontend: Live Tracking page loads with all controls and metrics
Frontend: Navigation between Dashboard, Tracking, and Profile working
Backend: Record breaking logic correctly detects when new records are set
Backend: Record categories properly initialized for all 5 distances
Backend: Improvement calculation working (40s improvement detected)
Backend: All existing functionality (auth, runs, routes, profile) still working
